_comment: Manual native-name overrides — highest priority, they beat OSM crowd data and the IndicXlit model. Keyed {lang: {english_name_lowercased: native_script_name}}. Add entries you have verified against an authoritative source (LGD, census, the local administration). Example: "te": { "visakhapatnam": "<verified Telugu spelling>" }. Kept intentionally empty so no unverified spellings ship; edit and commit as corrections are confirmed.
